text: Smoke attack - attacks entities with a beam attack, dealing a some negative effect to them.
Smoke bomb - when it hits a block, it spawns tubers of smoke.
Smoke Intangibility - turns the player into smoke and cannot be attacked.
$(o)Condition:$() Burning blocks or campfire within 16 blocks.
Phantom Smoke: +10% damage; 15% chance to apply "Weakness II" and "Slowness I" for 10 sec.
Dense Smoke: 15% chance to reduce incoming damage by 75%.
